claim_boundary: This proves production runtime execution for the accepted explicit controller-library search grammar and honest Basic/basic-land-type characteristics. It does not close T3.5, support arbitrary creature subtypes, expose an interactive hidden-information prompt, or semantically verify cards.
source_binding: The kernel, interpreter, mapper correction, smoke harness, tests, ADR record, specification, plan state, and this evidence record are committed together.
production_path: forge-core stores all five supertypes and all five basic land types in base and effective object characteristics and canonical hashes
basic land definitions compile exact type lines and intrinsic fixed-output mana abilities without card-name branches
Operation::SearchLibrary compiles only controller-library searches with a closed type-line selector grammar and a positive bounded maximum
ExecutionBindings supplies explicit object IDs and validates ownership, library membership, uniqueness, cardinality, and effective type-line predicates before mutation
chosen objects move through Action::MoveObject, Action::PutObjectOnTopOfLibrary, and Action::SetObjectTapped
the smoke harness synthesizes a satisfying hidden-zone object, checks exact destination and tapped state, and validates every action, zone, view, and deterministic hash
fail_closed_boundaries: unknown non-basic subtypes remain unsupported until the engine carries general subtype characteristics
mixed or open selector expressions remain unsupported
non-controller library searches and unsupported destinations remain unsupported
missing, duplicate, over-limit, out-of-zone, or type-mismatched choices fail before the first effect mutation
runtime smoke supplies deterministic explicit choices but does not claim an interactive human or AI prompt

verification.result: pass: all workspace unit, integration, and doc tests

verification.command: cargo clippy --offline -p forge-core -p forge-cards -p forge-testkit -p forge-porttools --all-targets -- -D warnings

verification.result: expected exit 2 because unsupported definitions remain; 605 passed, 19477 unsupported, 0 failed

continuation.next: Run card-specific deterministic T3.6 scenarios for runtime-ready identities while extending only the vertical interpreter blockers needed by the frozen set and four-deck pod.
